prompt: Fullstack project: React + Node API + PostgreSQL. Running /forge-team. Platform detection finds all 3. Walk me through waves, parallel spawning, and dependency blocking.
expected_output: Wave 0: DB validator spawned (alone, foundation layer). Waits for PASS. Wave 1: API validator spawned (depends on DB PASS). Waits for PASS. Wave 2: Web validator spawned (depends on API PASS). If DB FAILs in Wave 0 → API and Web are BLOCKED (never spawned). Records BLOCKED in their reports. If API FAILs in Wave 1 → Web is BLOCKED. Lead writes final report aggregating all waves with dependency chain and root causes.
